name: rppo_256_hidden
hypothesis: Doubling LSTM hidden size from 128 to 256 will improve multi-gate performance by giving the recurrent state more capacity to encode gate sequence and flight history information.
rationale: RPPO is the best architecture for high gate counts (exp #22: 5.82 avg gates, 29% full laps). The 128-unit LSTM may be bottlenecking representation capacity. A larger LSTM may better capture the temporal dependencies needed for consistent multi-gate traversal.
